nodes.name: Download from GCS
nodes.notes: Downloads the uploaded file from GCS using the gcs_path from the webhook payload

nodes.name: Gemini - Analyze Document
nodes.notes: Sends the document to Gemini for structured metadata extraction

nodes.name: Build Gemini Prompt
nodes.notes: Constructs the analysis prompt with extraction schema

nodes.name: Parse & Normalize
nodes.notes: Parses Gemini JSON, normalizes dates, merges with webhook data

nodes.name: Firestore - Update Document
nodes.notes: Updates the existing document record with all AI-extracted fields

nodes.name: Gemini - Generate Embedding
nodes.notes: Generates vector embedding of the document summary + tags for semantic search

nodes.name: Pinecone - Upsert Vector
nodes.notes: Upserts document embedding to Pinecone for RAG / semantic search

nodes.name: Callback to Backend

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "document_id": "{{ $('Parse & Normalize').first().json.document_id }}",
  "entity_id": "{{ $('Parse & Normalize').first().json.entity_id }}",
  "status": "processed",
  "document_name": "{{ $('Parse & Normalize').first().json.document_name }}",
  "document_type_detected": "{{ $('Parse & Normalize').first().json.document_type_detected }}",
  "ai_summary": "{{ $('Parse & Normalize').first().json.ai_summary }}",
  "ai_tags": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse & Normalize').first().json.ai_tags || []) }},
  "company_name": "{{ $('Parse & Normalize').first().json.company_name }}",
  "category": "{{ $('Parse & Normalize').first().json.category }}",
  "party_a": "{{ $('Parse & Normalize').first().json.party_a }}",
  "party_b": "{{ $('Parse & Normalize').first().json.party_b }}",
  "effective_date": "{{ $('Parse & Normalize').first().json.effective_date }}",
  "expiry_date": "{{ $('Parse & Normalize').first().json.expiry_date }}",
  "jurisdiction": "{{ $('Parse & Normalize').first().json.jurisdiction }}",
  "key_clauses": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse & Normalize').first().json.key_clauses || []) }},
  "monetary_amounts": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse & Normalize').first().json.monetary_amounts || []) }},
  "compliance_requirements": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse & Normalize').first().json.compliance_requirements || []) }},
  "risk_flags": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse & Normalize').first().json.risk_flags || []) }},
  "pinecone_indexed": true
}

nodes.notes: Calls back the ComplyChip backend with all extracted data so it can compute scores and update status
